worldbuilding.workspace.subPlots.emptyDe: Add 2-5 that reinforce or challenge your main arcs.

worldbuilding.landing.characters.title: Personae
worldbuilding.landing.characters.descrip: Use this landing to orient your social world before diving into records. Personae tracks agency: who can act, who is constrained, and what identity costs to maintain.
worldbuilding.landing.characters.orienta: Start by defining individual motives, then map collective pressures and inherited identity layers. Keep each record tied to story consequence, not just lore completeness.
worldbuilding.landing.characters.links.i: Specific voices with leverage and flaws
Define protagonist and supporting actors with motive, contradiction, and pressure-sensitive traits.
worldbuilding.landing.characters.links.f: Map group identity, social incentives, and power structures that shape decisions beyond individuals.
worldbuilding.landing.characters.links.l: Track bloodlines, legacy, and inherited expectation that alter status, obligation, and risk.
worldbuilding.landing.characters.links.n: Capture incomplete ideas and unresolved relationships before promoting them into canon records.
worldbuilding.landing.locations.title: Atlas
worldbuilding.landing.locations.descript: Atlas is where physical reality imposes consequence. Use this landing to align geography, travel cost, and spatial pressure before adding detail.
worldbuilding.landing.locations.orientat: Build from large-scale terrain to high-impact places, then ensure map logic supports the same constraints your scenes rely on.
worldbuilding.landing.locations.links.re: Define major geographies, regional pressure, and movement cost across your world.
worldbuilding.landing.locations.links.la: High-impact sites of memory and conflict
Catalog places where stakes concentrate and narrative turning points naturally occur.
worldbuilding.landing.locations.links.ma: Preserve travel coherence, adjacency logic, and strategic distance across story arcs.
worldbuilding.landing.locations.links.no: Capture world-space fragments that are useful later but not yet assigned to a canonical location.
worldbuilding.landing.lore.title: The Archive
worldbuilding.landing.lore.description: The Archive defines what the world believes to be true. Use this landing to align myth, systems, and tradition before expanding entries.
worldbuilding.landing.lore.orientation: Prioritize high-consequence beliefs first, then connect technology and ritual to lived behavior, law, and conflict.
worldbuilding.landing.lore.links.myths.t: Narrative frames of identity and destiny
worldbuilding.landing.lore.links.myths.d: Define stories societies tell to explain legitimacy, origin, and moral order.
worldbuilding.landing.lore.links.technol: Track tools, methods, and infrastructure that alter social and narrative outcomes.
worldbuilding.landing.lore.links.traditi: Capture rituals and norms that reinforce belonging, hierarchy, or cultural fracture.
worldbuilding.landing.lore.links.notes.d: Park speculative ideas until they can be connected to a belief system or cultural consequence.
worldbuilding.landing.plot-threads.title: Threads
worldbuilding.landing.plot-threads.descr: Threads is your causality layer. Use this landing to align why events happen before recording where they happen.
worldbuilding.landing.plot-threads.orien: Map major arcs first, verify sub-plot pressure, and keep motivations explicit enough that every turn has a believable parent cause.
worldbuilding.landing.plot-threads.links: Define the central causal chains that drive your story from setup to resolution.
Track supporting lines that sharpen pressure on the main arc without distracting from it.
Clarify why characters and factions choose each turn so events remain legible and earned.
Collect incomplete causal ideas before assigning them to a canonical arc lane.
worldbuilding.landing.timeline.title: Chronicles
worldbuilding.landing.timeline.descripti: Chronicles preserves temporal truth. Use this landing to align era logic, event causality, and personal chronology before filling details.
worldbuilding.landing.timeline.orientati: Lock macro chronology first, then slot key events, then reconcile personal histories with canon so continuity remains intentional.
worldbuilding.landing.timeline.links.era: Define broad periods and enduring transitions that shape present-day narrative context.
worldbuilding.landing.timeline.links.key: Record canonical moments that alter institutions, identity, and future possibility.
worldbuilding.landing.timeline.links.per: Track private chronology where lived memory diverges from public record.
worldbuilding.landing.timeline.links.not: Capture unresolved temporal fragments before anchoring them to an era or event line.
